queries.question: Give me all the comedies, also show the Shakespeare tragedies.
queries.sql:
SELECT Play.Title 
FROM Play
WHERE Play.Theatrical_Form = "Comedy" OR Play.Theatrical_Form = "Tragedy" AND Play.Author = "William Shakespeare"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:Title ?title .
  ?play p:Theatrical_Form ?theatrical_form_w .
  ?play p:Theatrical_Form ?theatrical_form_w2 .
  ?play p:Author ?author_w .
  FILTER((STR(?theatrical_form_w) = "Comedy" || (STR(?theatrical_form_w2) = "Tragedy" && STR(?author_w) = "William Shakespeare")))
}

queries.question: Show all comedies and tragedies written by William Shakespeare.
queries.sql:
SELECT Play.Title 
FROM Play
WHERE (Play.Theatrical_Form = "Comedy" OR Play.Theatrical_Form = "Tragedy") AND Play.Author = "William Shakespeare"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?play a :Play .
  ?play p:Title ?title .
  ?play p:Theatrical_Form ?theatrical_form_w .
  ?play p:Theatrical_Form ?theatrical_form_w2 .
  ?play p:Author ?author_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?theatrical_form_w) = "Comedy" || STR(?theatrical_form_w2) = "Tragedy")) && STR(?author_w) = "William Shakespeare"))
}
